verses.geez:
ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መኃድሪሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምዘ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡ እምግብጽ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኀይሎሙ ፡ በእደ ፡ ሙሴ
                  ፡ ወአሮን ።

translations.lxx: And these are the stages of the children of Israel, as they went out from the land of Egypt with their host by the hand of Moses and Aaron.
translations.kjv: These are the journeys of the children of Israel, which went forth out of the land of Egypt with their armies under the hand of Moses and Aaron.

verses.geez: ወጸሐፈ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ መኃድሪሆሙ ፡ አምጣነ ፡ ግዕዙ ፡ በቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መኃድሪሆሙ ፡ ዘግዕዙ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses wrote their removals and their stages, by the word of the Lord: and these are the stages of their journeying.
translations.kjv: And Moses wrote their goings out according to their journeys by the commandment of the LORD: and these are their journeys according to their goings out.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምራሜስ ፡ በቀዳሚ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አመ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወኀሙሱ ፡ ለቀደሚ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ በሳኒታ ፡ ፋስካ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡
                  ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በእድ ፡ ልዕልት ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: They departed from Ramesses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the day after the passover the children of Israel went forth with a high hand before all the Egyptians.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the morrow after the passover the children of Israel went out with an high hand in the sight of all the Egyptians.

verses.geez:
ወቦቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እለ ፡ ቀበሩ ፡ ምውቶሙ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ቀተለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ [ለ] ኵሉ ፡ በኵ[ረ] ፡
                  ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ አማልክቲሆሙኒ ፡ ገብረ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በቀለ ።

translations.lxx: And the Egyptians buried those that died of them, even all that the Lord smote, every first-born in the land of Egypt; also the Lord executed vengeance on their gods.
translations.kjv: For the Egyptians buried all their firstborn, which the LORD had smitten among them: upon their gods also the LORD executed judgments.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምነ ፡ ራሜሴ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሶቆት ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel departed from Ramesses, and encamped in Socchoth:
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel removed from Rameses, and pitched in Succoth.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሶቆት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቡታን ፡ ወአሐዱ ፡ ኅብረ ፡ በድው ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: and they departed from Socchoth and encamped in Buthan, which is a part of the wilderness.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Succoth, and pitched in Etham, which is in the edge of the wilderness.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቡታን ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ አፉሁ ፡ ለኤሮት ፡ ዘቅድመ ፡ ቤዔልሴፎን ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ቅድመ ፡ መግዶሉ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Buthan and encamped at the mouth of Iroth, which is opposite Beel-sepphon, and encamped opposite Magdol.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Etham, and turned again unto Pihahiroth, which is before Baalzephon: and they pitched before Migdol.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ኤሮት ፡ ወዐደዉ ፡ እንተ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ሠሉሰ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ ገዳም ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምረት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from before Iroth, and crossed the middle of the sea into the wilderness; and they went a journey of three days through the wilderness, and encamped in Picriæ.
translations.kjv: And they departed from before Pihahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and went three days’ journey in the wilderness of Etham, and pitched in Marah.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምረት ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤሌም ፡ ወቦቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤሌም ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ ወክልኤተ ፡ አንቅዕተ ፡
                  ማይ ፡ ወሰብዓ ፡ በቀልተ ፡ ተመርት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ህየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ማይ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Picriæ, and came to Ælim; and in Ælim were twelve fountains of water, and seventy palm-trees, and they encamped there by the water.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Marah, and came unto Elim: and in Elim were twelve fountains of water, and threescore and ten palm trees; and they pitched there.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኤሌም ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ኤርትራ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Ælim, and encamped by the Red Sea.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Elim, and encamped by the Red sea.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ኤርትራ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘሲ[ን] ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from the Red Sea, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.
translations.kjv: And they removed from the Red sea, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘሲ[ን] ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ራፋቃ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in Raphaca.
translations.kjv: And they took their journey out of the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in Dophkah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ራፋቃ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኤሉስ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Raphaca, and encamped in Ælus.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Dophkah, and encamped in Alush.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኤሉስ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ራፊድን ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ህየ ፡ ማየ ፡ ዘይሰቲ ፡ ሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Ælus, and encamped in Raphidin; and there was no water there for the people to drink.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Alush, and encamped at Rephidim, where was no water for the people to drink.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ራፊድን ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘሲና ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Raphidin, and encamped in the wilderness of Sina.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Rephidim, and pitched in the wilderness of Sinai.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘሲና ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ተዝካረ ፡ ፍትወት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from the wilderness of Sina, and encamped at the Graves of Lust.
translations.kjv: And they removed from the desert of Sinai, and pitched at Kibrothhattaavah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ተዝካረ ፡ ፍትወት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሴሮት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from the Graves of Lust, and encamped in Aseroth.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Kibrothhattaavah, and encamped at Hazeroth.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሴሮት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ራታማ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Aseroth, and encamped in Rathama.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Hazeroth, and pitched in Rithmah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ራታማ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሬሞት ፡ ዘፋሬስ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Rathama, and encamped in Remmon Phares.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Rithmah, and pitched at Rimmonparez.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሬሞት ፡ ዘፋሬስ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሌቦና ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Remmon Phares, and encamped in Lebona.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Rimmonparez, and pitched in Libnah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሌቦና ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሬሶ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Lebona, and encamped in Ressan.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Libnah, and pitched at Rissah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሬሶ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቄደት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Ressan, and encamped in Makellath.
translations.kjv: And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelathah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ መቄደት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አርሳፈር ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Makellath, and encamped in Saphar.
translations.kjv: And they went from Kehelathah, and pitched in mount Shapher.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ አርሳፈር ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከሬዳ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Saphar, and encamped in Charadath.
translations.kjv: And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ከሬደ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቄዶት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Charadath, and encamped in Makeloth.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Haradah, and pitched in Makheloth.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ መቄዶት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቀጦዐት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Makeloth, and encamped in Kataath.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Makheloth, and encamped at Tahath.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቀጦዐት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ተረት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Kataath, and encamped in Tarath.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Tahath, and pitched at Tarah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ተረት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መቴቃ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Tarath, and encamped in Mathecca.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Tarah, and pitched in Mithcah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ መቴቃ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሴምና ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Mathecca, and encamped in Selmona.
translations.kjv: And they went from Mithcah, and pitched in Hashmonah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሴምና ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መሱሩት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Selmona, and encamped in Masuruth.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Hashmonah, and encamped at Moseroth.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ መሱሩት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ በንያቅን ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Masuruth, and encamped in Banæa.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Moseroth, and pitched in Benejaakan.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ በንያቅን ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ገ[ድገ] ድ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Banæa, and encamped in the mountain Gadgad.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Benejaakan, and encamped at Horhagidgad.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ገ[ድገ] ድ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዔጤቤት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from the mountain Gadgad, and encamped in Etebatha.
translations.kjv: And they went from Horhagidgad, and pitched in Jotbathah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዔጤቤት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዔብሮና ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Etebatha, and encamped in Ebrona.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Jotbathah, and encamped at Ebronah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዔብሮና ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጌስዮን ፡ ጋቤር ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Ebrona, and encamped in Gesion Gaber.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Ebronah, and encamped at Eziongaber.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ጌስዮን ፡ ጋቤር ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘ[ፂን] ፡ ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘ[ፂን] ፡
                  ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘፋራን ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ ቃዴስ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Gesion Gaber, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin; and they departed from the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in the wilderness of Pharan; this is Cades.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Eziongaber, and pitched in the wilderness of Zin, which is Kadesh.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቃዴስ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሆር ፡ ዘገቦሁ ፡ ለምድረ ፡ ኤዶም ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Cades, and encamped in mount Or near the land of Edom.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Kadesh, and pitched in mount Hor, in the edge of the land of Edom.

verses.geez:
ወዐርገ ፡ አሮን ፡ ካህን ፡ በትእዛዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሞተ ፡ በህየ ፡ አመ ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ዓም ፡ እምዘ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡
                  ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምግብጽ ፡ በኃምስ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አመ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ወርኅ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron the priest went up by the command of the Lord, and died there in the fortieth year of the departure of the children of Israel from the land of Egypt, in the fifth month, on the first day of the month.
translations.kjv: And Aaron the priest went up into mount Hor at the commandment of the LORD, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the first day of the fifth month.

verses.geez: ወዓመቲሁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ መጠነ ፡ ኮነ ፡ አመ ፡ ሞተ ፡ በደብረ ፡ ሆር ፡ ፻፳፫ዓመት ፡ ሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Aaron was a hundred and twenty-three years old, when he died in mount Or.
translations.kjv: And Aaron was an hundred and twenty and three years old when he died in mount Hor.

verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ ከናናዊ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አራድ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ አመ ፡ ይበውኡ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡
                  እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Arad the Chananitish king (he too dwelt in the land of Chanaan) having heard when the children of Israel were entering the land—
translations.kjv: And king Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሆር ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴልሞና ።

translations.lxx: then they departed from mount Or, and encamped in Selmona.
translations.kjv: And they departed from mount Hor, and pitched in Zalmonah.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሴልሞና ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፊኖ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Selmona, and encamped in Phino.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Zalmonah, and pitched in Punon.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ፊኖ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኦቦት ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Phino, and encamped in Oboth.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Punon, and pitched in Oboth.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኦቦት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለሞአብ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Oboth, and encamped in Gai, on the other side Jordan on the borders of Moab.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Oboth, and pitched in Ijeabarim, in the border of Moab.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዴቦን ፡ ዘጋድ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Gai, and encamped in Dæbon Gad.
translations.kjv: And they departed from Iim, and pitched in Dibongad.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ዴቦን ፡ ዘጋድ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጌልሞን ፡ ዘዴብላቴም ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Dæbon Gad, and encamped in Gelmon Deblathaim.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Dibongad, and encamped in Almondiblathaim.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ጌልሞን ፡ ዘዴብላቴም ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድባረ ፡ አበርም ፡ ዘአንጻረ ፡ ናበው ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from Gelmon Deblathaim, and encamped on the mountains of Abarim, over against Nabau.
translations.kjv: And they removed from Almondiblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ አድባረ ፡ አበርም ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐረቢሃ ፡ ለሞአብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ኢየሪኮ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and encamped on the west of Moab, at Jordan by Jericho.
translations.kjv: And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho.

verses.geez: ወኀደሩ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ አሲሞት ፡ እስከ ፡ አቤልሰጢም ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ዐረቢሃ ፡ ለሞአብ ።

translations.lxx: And they encamped by Jordan between Æsimoth, as far as Belsa to the west of Moab.
translations.kjv: And they pitched by Jordan, from Bethjesimoth even unto Abelshittim in the plains of Moab.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ በዐረቢሃ ፡ ለሞአብ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ኢየሪኮ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses at the west of Moab by Jordan at Jericho, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,

verses.geez: ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ተዐድዉ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናኤን ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, and thou shalt say to them, Ye are to pass over Jordan into the land of Chanaan.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye are passed over Jordan into the land of Canaan;

verses.geez:
ወአጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡ ወደምስሱ ፡ ግብሮሙ ፡ ወኵሎ
                  ፡ አማልክቲሆሙ ፡ አጥፍኡ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ አምሳሊሆሙ ፡ አሰስሉ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall destroy all that dwell in the land before your face, and ye shall abolish their high places, and all their molten images ye shall destroy, and ye shall demolish all their pillars.
translations.kjv: Then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their pictures, and destroy all their molten images, and quite pluck down all their high places:

verses.geez:
ወደምስስዎሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወንበሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ እስመ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ወሀብኩክሙ ፡
                  ምድሮሙ ፡ መክፈልተክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall destroy all the inhabitants of the land, and ye shall dwell in it, for I have given their land to you for an inheritance.
translations.kjv: And ye shall dispossess the inhabitants of the land, and dwell therein: for I have given you the land to possess it.

verses.geez:
ወትወርስዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወተከፈልዋ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገድክሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይበዝኁ ፡ አብዝኁ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡
                  ወለእለ ፡ ይውሕዱ ፡ አውሕዱ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ወለለ ፡ ዘበጽሖ ፡ በስሙ ፡ ይኩኖ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ህየ ፡ በበነገድክሙ ፡
                  ወበበ ፡ አብያተ ፡ አበዊክሙ ፡ ተካፈልዋ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall inherit their land according to your tribes; to the greater number ye shall give the larger possession, and to the smaller ye shall give the less possession; to whatsoever part a man's name shall go forth by lot, there shall be his property: ye shall inherit according to the tribes of your families.
translations.kjv: And ye shall divide the land by lot for an inheritance among your families: and to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer ye shall give the less inheritance: every man’s inheritance shall be in the place where his lot falleth; according to the tribes of your fathers ye shall inherit.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ኢያጥፋእክምዎሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽክሙ ፡ ይከውኑክሙ ፡ እለ ፡
                  አትረፍክሙ ፡ አሥዋከ ፡ ለአዕይንቲክሙ ፡ ወአሜከላ ፡ ለገበዋቲክሙ ፡ ወይፃረሩክሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡
                  ትነብሩ ፡ አንትሙ ።

translations.lxx: But if ye will not destroy the dwellers in the land from before you, then it shall come to pass that whomsoever of them ye shall leave shall be thorns in your eyes, and darts in your sides, and they shall be enemies to you on the land on which ye shall dwell;
translations.kjv: But if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you; then it shall come to pass, that those which ye let remain of them shall be pricks in your eyes, and thorns in your sides, and shall vex you in the land wherein ye dwell.

verses.geez: ወዝክቱ ፡ ዘሐለይ[ኩ] ፡ ከመ ፡ እግበር ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ እገብር ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: and it shall come to pass that as I had determined to do to them, so I will do to you.
translations.kjv: Moreover it shall come to pass, that I shall do unto you, as I thought to do unto them.
